results.response: Happy to help with a few of those! Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging — a prepaid label is included. For order #A7729 specifically, please reach out to support@acme.example so our team can pull up the details securely. As for competitor recommendations, that's outside what I can help with here, but I hope we can resolve your concerns and keep you with us!
results.reason: Tries to satisfy all three branches simultaneously — return policy, order redirect, and competitor decline — producing the ceremonial multi-branch list the rubric marks as a failure.

results.response: For your return on order #A7729, please contact support@acme.example and our team will get that started for you. I'm not able to confirm refund amounts or provide any guidance on legal claims or damages — please direct those questions to your legal counsel and have them reach us through official channels.
results.reason: Picks one tier cleanly: redirects order details to support, hard-refuses refund amounts and legal claims in two sentences, no preamble, 67 words.

results.response: The fastest next step is to check your tracking link directly — most carriers update within a few hours of a delay. If the tracking shows no movement for more than 2 business days, email support@acme.example with your order number and we'll investigate with the carrier on your behalf.
results.reason: Picks single tier (self-serve tracking first, then escalation path), no preamble, 55 words, no hedging.
